category_sources: Official GitHub README describes a command-line tool to visualize Git history graphs.
source_facts.description says it shows clear Git graphs arranged for branching models.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is git-graph.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README links to a manual for detailed usage.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/mlange-42/git-graph, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub README and topics mention command-line graphing and branching models.
